title: sambucus plumosa
intro: Sambucus plumosa, also known as the elderflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sambucus plumosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Sambucus plumosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, syrup, or tincture, and is often used to soothe sore throats and coughs, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory issues.
